overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from 'The Mirage' showing a character running through shallow water in a fantastical alien landscape. The character moves from an open coastal area toward a massive rock archway with glowing red geological formations, passing lily pads and approaching a waterfall visible through the arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal inlet with rocky cliff

agents.ego_description: running through shallow water away from the rocky cliff toward the open landscape

notable_agents.action: small dark aquatic creature swimming ahead in the water

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation with layered strata
clear reflective water with ripples and white foam patches
jagged mountain peaks with misty atmospheric perspective
dark silhouette of a small swimming creature visible in the water ahead

segments.scene_description: The character begins running through shallow water alongside a tall rocky cliff on the right. The open landscape ahead reveals distant jagged mountains under a partly cloudy sky, with a small creature visible swimming in the water ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water plain approaching canyon entrance

events.description: location name 'THE MIRAGE' appears as text overlay on the right side of screen
large natural rock arch becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: sprinting steadily through the open water toward the distant rock formations

entered.detail: massive natural stone archway bridging two cliff faces in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues running through the expansive shallow water as the rocky cliff recedes into the distance. A massive rock arch becomes visible ahead, and the location text 'THE MIRAGE' briefly appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon entrance with alien geological formations

events.description: glowing red veins appear on the canyon walls, indicating alien mineral deposits
large green lily pads appear floating in the shallow water

agents.ego_description: running toward the massive rock archway with glowing red elements, splashing through water with lily pads

entered.detail: bioluminescent red striations running through the canyon rock walls
large circular green lily pads floating on the water surface
cascading water visible through the rock arch in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the canyon entrance where the rock arch dominates the view. The environment features alien glowing red veins on the canyon walls and large lily pads in the water. A waterfall becomes visible through the arch as the character nears the canyon threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive alien coastline that gradually narrows into a glowing canyon entrance. It begins with the character running through shallow water beside a tall rocky cliff, with jagged mountains visible under a partly cloudy sky and a small creature swimming ahead. As the character continues forward, the cliff recedes into the distance and the landscape opens up to reveal a massive rock archway ahead. The scene then shifts toward the canyon threshold, where the water is dotted with large lily pads and the surrounding walls are etched with glowing red veins. Finally, the camera approaches the mouth of the canyon, bringing a distant waterfall into view through the center of the arch.
